description:
Calculate the total impedance of a series RLC circuit using the Electrical Engineering Calculations app. 

Circuit Parameters:
- Resistance (R): 120 Ohms
- Inductance (L): 300 mH
- Capacitance (C): 33 uF
- Frequency (f): 60 Hz

Save the numeric value of the total impedance in Ohms to /sdcard/tasks/series_rlc_impedance/result.txt.
